task_completion.description: Verify that the Tromso Space Physics Center ground station is created with the correct coordinates and set as the default QTH.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Edit Ground Station window with Latitude 69.6492, Longitude 18.9553, and Altitude 20, AND/OR the Preferences window showing 'Tromso Space Physics Center' selected as the default ground station.

task_completion.description: Verify that a tracking module named 'Physics_Telemetry' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A module window, tab, or title bar in GPredict clearly labeled 'Physics_Telemetry'.

task_completion.description: Verify that SUOMI NPP, NOAA 19, and METOP-B are added to the 'Physics_Telemetry' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The module configuration window or the module display itself lists the satellites SUOMI NPP, NOAA 19, and METOP-B (or their respective NORAD IDs: 37849, 33591, 38771).

task_completion.description: Verify that the module uses a 'List' layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Physics_Telemetry' module displays data in a tabular/list format, without a map or polar view.

task_completion.description: Verify that ONLY the Satellite, Range, Range Rate, Altitude, and Velocity columns are displayed in the list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The column headers in the 'Physics_Telemetry' list view show exactly 'Satellite', 'Range', 'Range Rate', 'Altitude', and 'Velocity' (or their standard GPredict abbreviations like 'Sat', 'Alt', 'Vel'). No other columns (like Azimuth, Elevation, etc.) should be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the global module update cycle is set to 100 milliseconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GPredict Preferences window (under the Modules or General tab) shows the 'Update cycle' or refresh rate set to '100' (milliseconds).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict configuration dialogs (e.g., Preferences, Module configuration, Ground Station setup) rather than a terminal window editing configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard GPredict application window and UI elements are visible, not a mock-up, text editor, or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected configuration into a text file to simulate success.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes are reflected in the actual GPredict UI, not just typed out in a terminal or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Tromso Space Physics Center coordinates: 69.6492°N, 18.9553°E, 20m altitude. Required satellites: SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-B (NORAD 38771). Target module name: 'Physics_Telemetry'. Expected global update cycle: 100 milliseconds.
